title: Asleep
smart_description: Awakens upon losing HP or {Amount:plural:next turn|after [blue]{}[/blue] turns}.
notes: This power tracks remaining turns of sleep as a Counter. When the creature takes unblocked damage, it awakens immediately. When the counter reaches 0 on their turn end, the WakeUpMove is triggered. Associated PlatingPower is removed when awakening or when the counter is about to expire.
